name: Directel Holdings Limited
summary: Directel Holdings Limited, a mobile virtual network operator, provides mobile telecommunication and value-added services in Hong Kong, Mainland China, and Singapore. The company operates through two segments, Telecommunications Services and Distribution Business. It is involved in distributing mobile phones and electronic products; trading airtime and mobile data sourced from various mobile network operators; and selling airtime and mobile data to dealers and users. The company also offers telesales dealership and other services; and SIM cards. Directel Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2009 and is headquartered in Hong Kong, Hong Kong.
